description: Style Note Take semi-formal dressing to the next level with these slip-on leather shoes from red tape. With comfort and style rolled into one, these shoes work great for people who love to take off and wear their shoes with ease. Team this with jeans or cargoes and T-shirts for that smart look. Product Details Full grain leather upper for maximum durability, breathability and style Slip-on system for easy wear and removal Elastic inserts on the sides of the tongue for a snug, customised Fit Stitch detailing to enhance shoe life Rounded collar with a fabric inner for comfort Fabric inner lining for maximum breathability Padded fabric footbed for all-day comfort Durable rubber outsole in a boat shape for ergonomic comfort Textured lugs along the medial side and toe region, with terraced lugs on the lateral side and pivot points on the forefoot and heel for maximum grip, traction and easy movement of the foot Material and Care Leather Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not store in direct sunlight
